---
title: Grand Canyon, cours aquarelle Savoir dessiner
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784735228/grandcanyon_d5amqh.png
description: Grand Canyon, cours aquarelle Savoir dessiner
categories: [urbansketch]
date: 2023/05/01
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784735228/grandcanyon_d5amqh.png)


::: {.visually-hidden}
{{< meta description >}}
:::
